allocation_method.description: Defines how the public IP address is allocated (Static or Dynamic).

ddos_protection_mode.description: Specifies the DDoS protection mode for the public IP.

ddos_protection_plan_id.description: The ID of the DDoS protection plan to be associated with the public IP.

domain_name_label.description: A label assigned to the public IP, used for DNS settings.

edge_zone.description: Specifies the edge zone where the public IP is deployed.

idle_timeout_in_minutes.description: Specifies the idle timeout for the public IP in minutes.

ip_tags.description: A set of tags assigned to the public IP address.

ip_version.description: Specifies the IP version (IPv4 or IPv6) of the public IP.

name.description: The name of the public IP resource.

public_ip_prefix_id.description: The ID of the public IP prefix associated with this public IP.

reverse_fqdn.description: The reverse FQDN associated with the public IP.

sku.description: The SKU of the public IP (Basic or Standard).

sku_tier.description: The tier of the SKU for the public IP, if applicable.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the public IP resource.

zones.description: The availability zones in which the public IP is available.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
